summary: Demo Project feature (Phase 7, Part 4) tested. CRITICAL BUG FOUND AND FIXED: Quote creation was failing due to unique constraint on quoteNumber ('Q-DEMO-001'). Fixed by making quote number unique per user ('Q-DEMO-{shortId}'). After fix: 12/12 backend tests pass, all UI tests pass.
critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: createDemoProject.ts was using hardcoded 'Q-DEMO-001' for quoteNumber which violated unique constraint. Changed to 'Q-DEMO-{shortId}' where shortId is first 8 chars of userId.
test_credentials: New users: auto-generated emails like demo-banner-test-{timestamp}@test.com, password=TestDemo123!
seed_data_creation: Demo project automatically creates: 1 lead (Sarah Johnson), 1 quote (Q-DEMO-{shortId}), 1 activity (QUOTE_SENT), 1 interaction (EMAIL_SENT)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Demo project feature is working correctly. New user signup creates a demo lead with isDemoData=true, a demo quote with unique number Q-DEMO-{shortId}, and related activity/interaction. The DemoProjectBanner shows on dashboard when isDemoData lead exists. Banner has dismiss (X) and delete buttons. Existing users do NOT see the demo banner since their leads don't have isDemoData=true.

backend_apis.GET /api/leads/:id/quotes: PASSED - Returns demo quote with Q-DEMO-{shortId}

frontend_ui.DemoProjectBanner visibility: PASSED - Shows for new users with demo data
frontend_ui.DemoProjectBanner content: PASSED - Shows 'Welcome! We created a sample project for you'

bug_fixed.issue: Demo quote creation failing with Prisma unique constraint error on quoteNumber
bug_fixed.root_cause: createDemoProject.ts used hardcoded 'Q-DEMO-001' which violates unique constraint when second user signs up
bug_fixed.fix_applied: Changed quoteNumber to 'Q-DEMO-{shortId}' where shortId = userId.slice(0,8).toUpperCase()
